description: Trivial LOW-blast change — lean chain (root → reviewer). For one-line fixes, typo corrections, comment edits where operator can implement directly without an executor specialist. Reviewer validates the change against acceptance.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (fill in: what needs changing and why)
SCOPE: {{scope}}
NON_GOALS: (fill in: what NOT to touch)
VALIDATION: (fill in: command that proves correctness)
ACCEPTANCE: (fill in: externally observable outcome)

LOW-blast trivial change. Operator implements directly or via a one-shot executor dispatch. Reviewer validates.

steps.title: reviewer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: review root's diff against ACCEPTANCE.
INPUTS: root's diff (on chain branch) + root's contract.
OUTPUTS: structured verdict (PASS | PARTIAL | FAIL) + Release Checklist. Cite file:line for findings.
SCOPE: same as root ({{scope}}).
NON_GOALS: no code edits; do not escalate scrutiny beyond root's declared level unless surface auto-escalation table fires.
